title: emails.json
description: Array of email records exchanged between the fetch and summarize states of the email-summary workflow.

sender.description: From address; either a bare email or 'Display Name <addr@example.com>'.

recipient.description: Comma-separated To addresses. CC/BCC are not represented.

subject.description: Subject line verbatim. Empty string is allowed.

date.description: Date as it appears in the source headers. Not normalized.

body.description: Plain text body. HTML must be stripped by the producer; newlines preserved.
